title: Psicom 1260 interface
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Psicom 1260 interface''' was a cybernetic chip implant installed in a being's brain, which allowed for direct interface with [[Droid/Legends|droids]] and [[Computer/Legends|computers]] through the chip's wireless user interface. [[Tsian]] had one installed in her head.

==Appearances==
*[[Republic 47|''Republic'' 47]] {{1st}}
*[[Republic 48|''Republic'' 48]]

[[Category:Cybernetic implants]]
[[Category:Data storage and processing]]
